EXPRESSION:
VAR __highest =
    MAXX ( ALLSELECTED ( 'Date'[Date] ), [__sales] )
VAR __lowest =
    MINX ( ALLSELECTED ( 'Date'[Date] ), [__sales] )
VAR Result =
    SWITCH (
        TRUE (),
        __highest = [__sales], "#108372",
        __lowest = [__sales], "#F15628",
        BLANK ()
    )
RETURN
    Result

VAR Period =
    DATESINPERIOD ( 'Date'[Date], MAX ( 'Date'[Date] ), - [Selected_Months], MONTH )
VAR TotalProfit =
    CALCULATE ( [Selected Measure], Period )
VAR Mon =
    CALCULATE ( DISTINCTCOUNT ( 'Date'[Month] ), Period )
RETURN
    DIVIDE ( TotalProfit, Mon, BLANK () )

VAR __selected =
    SWITCH (
        TRUE (),
        SELECTEDVALUE ( Slicer_Table[__measure] ) = "__cogs", "COGS",
        SELECTEDVALUE ( Slicer_Table[__measure] ) = "__gross_sales", "Gross sales",
        SELECTEDVALUE ( Slicer_Table[__measure] ) = "__profit", "Profit",
        SELECTEDVALUE ( Slicer_Table[__measure] ) = "__sales", "Sales",
        SELECTEDVALUE ( Slicer_Table[__measure] ) = "__units_sold", "Units sold"
    )
RETURN
    SELECTEDVALUE ( Selected_Months[Value] ) & " Month Moving average for " & __selected

VAR Months =
    DATEDIFF ( DATE ( 2018, 9, 1 ), TODAY (), MONTH ) - 1
VAR Years =
    ROUNDDOWN ( Months / 12, 0 )
VAR Result =
    CONCATENATE (
        CONCATENATE ( CONCATENATE ( Years, " Years, " ), Months - ( Years * 12 ) ),
        " Months"
    )
RETURN
    Result

VAR MaxDate =
    MAX ( 'Date'[Date] ) -- Saves the last visible date
RETURN
    CALCULATE (
        [__sales],
        -- Computes sales amount
        'Date'[Date] <= MaxDate,
        -- Where date is before the last visible date
        ALL ( 'Date' ) -- Removes any other filters from Date
    )

VAR MaxFilters = 3
VAR __dumpfilters =
    IF (
        ISFILTERED ( 'Calculation group'[Ordinal] ),
        VAR ___f =
            FILTERS ( 'Calculation group'[Ordinal] )
        VAR ___r =
            COUNTROWS ( ___f )
        VAR ___t =
            TOPN ( MaxFilters, ___f, 'Calculation group'[Ordinal] )
        VAR ___d =
            CONCATENATEX ( ___t, 'Calculation group'[Ordinal], ", " )
        VAR ___x =
            "'Calculation group'[Ordinal] = " & ___d
                & IF ( ___r > MaxFilters, ", ... [" & ___r & " items selected]" ) & " "
        RETURN
            ___x & UNICHAR ( 13 )
                & UNICHAR ( 10 )

        & IF (
            ISFILTERED ( 'Calculation group'[Time Intelligence] ),
